description.en: Resolve the date_time, compression attributes, and external attributes to suitable defaults as used by ZipFile.writestr(). Returns self for chaining. Added in version 3.14.

excerpt.es: Resolve the date_time, compression attributes, and external attributes to suitable defaults as used by ZipFile.writestr(). Returns self for chaining. Added in version 3.14.
